module 1: role definition  
the role of the task is to decompose a system prompt into four independent modules, each addressing a distinct aspect of the task.

module 3: output format  
the output must be a single entity, in lowercase letters, without any punctuation or additional text.  

module 4: error prevention  
the output must be accurate, consistent, and free from any ambiguity or incorrect relationships.
